title: F2P Starter Core
description: Easily accessible roster with 3 four star anchors. Light 2 duo Apollinis anchors the frontline and combines with good magic damage, AOE, stun unit Starspine. 4 star Framamba is a solid physical dps that's also 4 star Shilian's companion that builds a memory roster. Camcorgi is a 5 star that is obtainable for free after doing some Apex Club quests (which are not gated by F2P status), good physical damage, AOE and crowd control and allowing a flexible memory last slot to proc a 3 memory aspect synergy. A team of these 4 pretty much clears most content by varying the other eidos/nexus anima slots. (see more teams below)

title: Expanded Core
description:
This team clears content well and consists of two Protectors. All 5★ units here are just at base copies (R0/E0).

Beta tested by EOD.

title: Seroplumanth R2 Core
description:
This team clears content well and consists of two Protectors. The key 5★ with high Rapport/Eidothreads is Seroplumanth R2.

Beta tested by EOD.
